title: 5 x Fairy Original Washing Up Liquid 320ml Bottles Powerful Grease-Cutting Dishwashing Liquid Concentrated Formula Long-Lasting Fresh Scent Gentle on Hands Kitchen Cleaning Essential
features: Powerful grease-cutting action effortlessly removes tough grease and grime from dishes pots and pans ensuring sparkling clean results with minimal effort and reducing the need for scrubbing
Concentrated formula means a small amount goes a long way providing excellent value and long-lasting use making each 320ml bottle efficient for numerous washing up sessions
Infused with Fairy’s signature fresh scent leaving your kitchen smelling wonderfully clean and enhancing the overall dishwashing experience with a pleasant fragrance
Gentle on hands despite its powerful cleaning capabilities eliminating the need for gloves and ensuring a comfortable dishwashing experience even with frequent use
Convenient pack of five 320ml bottles offers a substantial supply of dishwashing liquid ideal for households ensuring you always have Fairy Original on hand for your cleaning needs
description: Product description Experience the unmatched cleaning power of Fairy Lemon Washing Up Liquid with this convenient pack of five 320ml bottles. Renowned for its superior grease-cutting performance, Fairy Original effortlessly removes tough grease and grime, leaving your dishes sparkling clean with minimal effort. Each bottle contains a concentrated formula, ensuring that a small amount goes a long way, providing excellent value and long-lasting use. The rich lather and durable bubbles extend the cleaning action, making dishwashing more efficient and reducing the need for reapplication. Infused with Fairy’s signature fresh scent, this washing up liquid not only cleans effectively but also leaves your kitchen smelling wonderfully clean. Despite its powerful cleaning capabilities, it is gentle on your hands, eliminating the need for gloves and ensuring a comfortable dishwashing experience. Whether you're tackling the aftermath of a large family meal or simply maintaining a clean and welcoming kitchen space, Fairy Original is your go-to choice for a pristine, efficient clean that’s also gentle on your hands and the planet. Ingredients Quartz,Sodium Carbonate,Soap, Glycerin,Sodium, Bicarbonate
